char_overview: A reliable operative without standout individual combat ability but stable performance in routine operations. Natural mentor for newcomers and dependable anchor in squad deployments.
char_looks: 168cm Long brown hair, high ponytail Brown eyes. 狩灵协会2科 standard: white hooded jacket, black tight-fitting casual wear, chest armor, black pants, combat boots. Standard-issue katana, 狩灵协会 standard-issue. Channels 灵力 to amplify cutting power and impact force, with effect scaling to the 灵力 infused.
char_flaws: Weak in solo combat; sacrifices herself too easily for others.; Checks communication equipment periodically, lining up gear in a specific order before every mission.
char_mission: Keep her teammates alive and herself out of their way.
char_origin: Military school graduate, joined 狩灵协会2科. Consistently stable performance, compensates for lack of standout talent with discipline and reliability.
